productDisplayName: Puma Men Rod Silver Black Watches
description: This watch from puma comes in a bold design of sub-dials and the puma logo on its black rectangular dial, which will make you stand out it the crowd and always get you noticed. This active watch is perfect for urban wear.Case diameter: 45 mmCase thickness: 12 mmDial shape: SquareWarranty: 2 YearsMetal case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfort PU straps with a buckle clasp for comfort and styleBlack dial with cat logo below 12 o'clockDial showing 24-hour, 60-minute and chronograph seconds sub dialsPolished hands with sweep secondsPolished hands mark sub dialsAnalog date aperture at the 4 o'clock markerQuartz movement of time display Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistant up to 30 metres
